title: SAP Roadmap Tracker
description: Automated daily tracking of SAP product roadmap changes — additions, deletions, and delivery-quarter shifts — with Markdown reports and a static preview site.
benefits: Detects roadmap changes across 3 SAP products every morning at 03:00 UTC
Alerts on delivery-quarter shifts before they hit project plans
Searchable Gantt chart and change timeline on a GitHub Pages site
